report.title: Technical Enforcement: Policy-as-Code & Cryptographic Evidence Manifests
report.abstract: This report details the technical enforcement mechanisms for the CRS-UUID-001 system. It specifies the OPA/Rego policy-as-code integration for CI/CD and runtime safety, the HardwareEnclaveAttestor protocol for cryptographic proof of execution, and the structure of the Cryptographic Evidence Manifests required for regulator-defensible audit trails.
report.content:
# 1. Policy-as-Code Enforcement (OPA/Rego)
## 1.1 CI/CD Compliance Gates Sentinel v2.4 enforces GDL (Governance Description Language) constraints during the model training and deployment pipeline: - **Redline Check**: Deny deployment if the training dataset includes non-consented PII (GDPR Art 6). - **Fairness check**: Deny if disparate impact ratio for protected classes (FCRA/ECOA) is outside $[0.8, 1.25]$.
### Example: Rego Fairness Policy ```rego package sentinel.bank.credit
default allow = false
allow { input.disparate_impact_ratio >= 0.8 input.disparate_impact_ratio <= 1.25 input.accuracy_score > 0.95 } ```
## 1.2 Runtime Policy Gating The **Immune System (L5)** intercepts all gRPC requests to the CRS Reasoning Kernel: - **Reasoning Depth**: Limit to 5 recursive steps per scoring request to prevent resource exhaustion. - **PII Scrubbing**: Mandate use of the `context_redactor` middleware for all context fragments.
---
# 2. Cryptographic Evidence Manifests
## 2.1 HardwareEnclaveAttestor (HEA) Protocol The HEA protocol ensures that the CRS-UUID-001 model is executing within an untampered Trusted Execution Environment (TEE). 1. **Challenge**: The Sentinel Plane issues a nonce to the Enclave. 2. **Attestation**: The Enclave signs the model hash, reasoning trace, and nonce using its hardware-bound private key. 3. **Verification**: Sentinel verifies the signature against the cloud provider's Root of Trust.
## 2.2 AuditorWORM Manifest Structure Every credit decision produces a Cryptographic Evidence Manifest (CEM): - **TraceID**: Global EAIP identifier. - **ModelVersion**: Signed hash of the CRS-UUID-001 weights. - **PolicyHash**: Identifier of the specific Rego policy version active at time of inference. - **ProvenanceChain**: Merkle-DAG of all retrieved RAG context fragments. - **AttestationSignature**: Result of the HEA protocol.
